title: TFC + IE Crossover
description: Addon that makes TFC and IE compatible
body:
This addon provides possibility to play [TerraFirmaCraft: TNG](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) and [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering) together on Minecraft 1.18.2! 

Some features:
- Recipes are tweaked to use TFC materials and machines will output TFC metals.
- External heater can heat up TFC crucible.
- Herbicide works with TFC soil.
- Drill heads of colored steels are added.
- And more!

**Everything you need to know is located in Engineer's Manual.**

Credits:
- Thanks to Developers of such wonderful mods as TerraFirmaCraft: TNG and Immersive Engineering.
- Especially to EERussianguy, whose addon FirmaLife was used as base for this addon.
- Some textures of BluSunrize were used or modified.
- Also, were used some textures from TFC: TNG, all credits to the developers.
